name: Zuora
description: Zuora subscription management and recurring billing platform. Monitor API access and user management.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Zuora
2. Go to Settings > Administration > OAuth Client Management
3. Create a new OAuth Client with appropriate permissions
4. Copy the Client ID and Client Secret
5. If your Zuora tenant is not on US Cloud 2, enter your base URL (e.g. rest.eu.zuora.com for EU)
6. Enter the values below

credentialFields.label: Client ID
credentialFields.helpText: Zuora OAuth Client ID. Go to Settings > Administration > OAuth Client Management.

credentialFields.label: Client Secret
credentialFields.helpText: Zuora OAuth Client Secret. Generated when creating an OAuth client.

credentialFields.label: Zuora API Base URL
credentialFields.helpText: Your Zuora REST API base URL. Examples: rest.zuora.com (US Prod Cloud 2), rest.na.zuora.com (US Prod Cloud 1), rest.eu.zuora.com (EU), rest.ap.zuora.com (APAC), rest.sandbox.na.zuora.com (US Sandbox). Default: rest.zuora.com

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies Zuora billing platform is accessible by authenticating via OAuth and checking the catalog.

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Queries Zuora platform users to verify billing access is managed.
